title: Mamit-ah Indian Army Sipai lak runpui neih tur chungchang sawiho
content:
4573/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 24th of February, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Pi Carolyn L.B Khiangte, Addl. DC hovin Indian Army ( Agniveer) lak runpui neih tur chungchang sawiho a ni a, Army Recruiting office-a thawk te lo kalin lakdan tur leh a kimchang sawi zauna an nei.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Indian Army (Agniveer) lak runpui kal pui turah Mamit District chhunga thalai kum 17 leh a chanve atanga kum 22 inkar, thiamna ngai bitukin a huam te'n an dil ngei theih nan zau zawka puanzar dan tur te sawiho a ni.

Indian Army lak runpui kalpuina turah hian 13th February to 1st April, 2026 chhungin online hmanga dil duhte tanwww.joinindiaarmy.nic.in/ah te dilna thehluh theih a ni a, he hna dil duh zawhfiah leh hrechiang duhte tan hian Planning Branch,DC Office Mamit-ah office hun chhunga zawhfiah theih a ni bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhipah mock drill nei dawn
content:
4572/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 23thFebruary, 2026:Naktuk February ni 24, 2026 (Thawhlehni) hian National Disaster Response Force (NDRF) kaihhruaiin Govt. Serchhip College ah earthquake (lirnghing) mock drill neih a ni dawn a. Hemi chungchang sawihoin vawiin chawhnu khan Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hoin DC Meeting Hall ah thuneitute an thukhawm.

DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan Serchhipa mock drill an lo neih tawhah department hrang hrang te, tlawmngai pawl te, mipui mimir te bakah Assam Rifles leh BSF te thawhhona a tha em em, tih a sawi a. Tun tuma district level mock drill neih turah pawh mawhphurhna neitu zawng zawngin tha taka an hlen chhuah a beisei thu leh, mipui mimir te tan pawh chhiatna a thlen thulha inzirna tangkai tak a nih a beisei thu a sawi a ni.

Mock Drill hi naktuk chawhnu dar 2 ah Govt. Serchhip College ah neih a ni dawn a. Staging Area atan Serchhip DC Pisapui hman a ni a nga. Lirnghingin a tihchhiat tur hi Govt. Serchhip College Administrative block a ni ang.

Vawiin meeting ah hian mawhphurhna hrang hrang siam fel a ni a. Meeting zawh hian a taka tel turte, lirnghinna hmuna chhanhimna hna thawk turte leh mawhphurhna dang neitu tan inhrilhhriatna hun buatsaih zui a ni.

Attachment

title: Tuirial Bawlhhlawh paihna hmuna thawktu te tan Free Health Checkup nei
content:
4571/2025-2026

23rd February, 2026 :Vawiin khan National Health Mission, NHM leh Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC) tangkawp in Solid Waste Management System, Tuirial-a thawktu te tan One Day Health Check-up buatsaih a ni a, thawktu 100 chuang te hriselna endik an ni.

He One Day Health Checkup hi Pu Lalremruata Kullai, Joint Municipal Commissioner in kaihhruaiin NUHM, NHM te nena Programme tha tak buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. He programme hi Aizawl Day (25th February) lawmna puala buatsaih a nih thu sawiin  Hnathawktu te chu he Health Checkup hi ngaipawimawh a, tangkai taka hmang turin a chah.

Dr. Lalawmpuia Chhangte, Jt. Director (FW) & SNO, NUHM chuan AMC te nena programme tha tak buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Kum engemaw zat chhung NUHM hmalakna in Solid Waste Management Centre, Tuirialah hian free Health Checkup neih a nih tawh thu a sawi a, thawktu te chu an hriselna ngaipawimawh turin a chah. Dr. Awmpuia chuan Health Department hian mipuite hriselna a ngaipawimawh em em a, Free Health Check Up hi hmun hrang hrangah pawh neih reng a nih thu a sawi bawk.

He health Check up ah hian Test chi hrang hrang 13 vel a thlawnin tihsak niin ABHA  Health ID siamsak zel an ni a, inentirte hi a thlawn in Damdawi pek an ni. An mamawh ang Vaccine pawh pek nghal vek an ni bawk.

Specialist Doctor te, Sihphir UPHC, Zemabawk UPHC, Lawipui UPHC-a Doctor leh Staff te bakah MMU Aizawl East leh Tuirial UHWC a thawktu ten an hriselna hi an endik a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Chhiarpui 2027 atana inbuatsaihna ni thum chhung awh tur training ṭan a ni
content:
4570/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Ramtuk thla ni 23: Vawiin khan ni thum chhung awh tur, Chhiarpui (Census of India) 2027 atana inbuatsaihna, 'Three-Day District Level Training & Regular Clerical Assistant Training' chu Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah ṭan a ni a, February ni 25 thleng a awh ang.

He training hi chhim lam district pali – Lunglei, Siaha, Lawngtlai leh Hnahthial district-te tana buatsaih a ni a. District tin atangin District Census Officer, Additional District Census Officer, Charge Census Officer, Additional Charge Census Officer leh Regular Clerical Assistant ṭheuhte telin, mi 50 an tel a ni.

Training hi Lunglei District Additional Deputy Commissioner, District Census Officer ni bawk, Pi Zoramdini chuan a hawng a. Directorate of Census Operation, Mizoram aṭangin Assistant Director Pu Shivam Gupta leh thawktu dangte'n training hi pein, Chhiarpui 2027 kalpui tura thil pawimawh hrang hrang an zirtir a ni.

Chhiarpui thawh khatna, Census Phase-I –Houselisting leh Houselisting Operation chu April ni 16, 2026 aṭanga May ni 15, 2026 inkar chhung hian kalpui a ni dawn a. Hetah hian in ding lai leh chhungkaw luah laite chu a dinhmun leh a hman dan hrang hrang chhinchhiah fel a ni ang a. Phase-II –Population Enumeration erawh chu nakkum, February 2027 aṭanga kalpui tura ruahman niin, mihring awm zat leh an dinhmunte zir chian leh chhinchhiah a ni thung ang.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP LEH SUPERINTENDENT OF POLICE TEN CHANCHINBU MITE KAWM
content:
4569/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 23rd February 2026 : Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00 PM khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga leh Lawngtlai Superintendent of Police Pu PC Lalchunglura te chuan DC Office Chamber-ah Chanchinbu mite kawmna an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan sawrkarin ruihhlo do  kawng hrang hrangin a kalpui mek a, Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan- hnuaiah project lian tak  'Drug - Free District' kum thum chhung atan kalpui a nih tur thu a tarlang a. He project - hi Lawngtlai District chhunga khaw tinah kalpui a ni ang a ti. Ruihhlo awm lohna khua din emaw siam chu thil pawimawh tak a ni, tiin khaw tina khawtlang hruaitute theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a ni. Ruihhlo do kawngah chanchinbu mite an pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, mipuite zirtir kawngah theihtawp chhuahpui turin chanchinbu mite a ngen a ni. Ruihhlo do kawngah tha thlah theih a ni lo tih sawiin Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan khawtlang hruaitu leh mipuite theihtawp lo chhuahpui turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Pu PC Lalchunglura chuan ruihhlo dona kawngah  NCORD leh Operation Jericho - chak taka kalpui mek a nih thu a tarlang a. Ruihhlo do beihpui thlak kawngah tanrual thiam a pawimawh hle tih sawiin, VC,  NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

Pu Lalrindika, SDC chuan 'Project : Drug - Free District- Lawngtlai' nihphung leh kalpui a nih dan tur tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. LADC- hnuaia khua - 99 leh CADC- hnuaia khua - 88 ah te project hi kalpui a nih tur thu a tarlang a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Mizoram Journalist Association (MJA) Lawngtlai, President, Lawngtlai District Village Council Association - te an tel thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: AH&VETY MINISTER-IN AFRICAN SWINE FEVER (ASF) AVANGA RAN SUATTE ZANGNADAWMNA PEKCHHUAHNA HUN A HMANG
content:
4568/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl the 23rd February, 2026 : Vawiin chawhma khan Animal Husbandry & Veterinary (AH&Vety) Department Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan African Swine Fever (ASF) avanga mahni ran vulhlai suattute hnena zangnadawmna pek chhuahna hun ‘Distribution & Launching of ASF Compensation’ chu MINECO-a a Office Chamber-ah a hmanpui.

AH&Vety Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan March ni 21, 2021-a Lungsen, Lunglei District-a ASF hmuhchhuah a nih atanga vawiin ni thleng hian kan ram economy sawi nghing dawt khawpin ASF avangin kum tin vawk thi leh suat a awm thin thu a sawi a. India Sawrkar laipui thupek angin vawk suatte chauh hi sawrkar laipui bituk zat leh dan dinglai angin zangnadawmna 50% Centrally Sponsored Scheme (CSS) leh State Matching Share (SMS) hmanga pek theih a nih thu sawiin, kum 2022-23 leh 2023-24 chhung khan zangnadawmna atana kan sum mamawh 25% (CSS & SMS) chauh kan dawn avangin zangnadawmna dawngtute hnenah 25% pek a ni, a ti a.

Minister chuan ranvulhtute hlohna a nasat avangin kum 2024 khan ASF chu Mizoram Sawrkarin State Disaster-ah puangin hemi atan hian ran thi (suat tel lovin) ralna, ran thi pakhat zelah Rs 4000, ralna dawngtu pakhat zelah vawk 6 (paruk) chin huamin Mizoram chhungah ralna sum sem chhuah vek tawh a nih thu a sawi a. Kum 2025 chhunga sum mamawhte chu 2026-27 Action Plan-ah dil mek a nih thu sawiin, 100% hmuh ngei theih nan chak taka bawhzui mek a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Kum 2024 chhunga vawk suatte zangnadawmna hi a vaiin cheng nuai 1559.34 niin, Centrally Sponsored Schemes (CSS) leh State Matching Share (SMS) kaltlangin Central leh State Sawrkar tangkawpa semchhuah tur a ni a. Zangnadawmna sum hi a semna tur hmun District Officer-te hnen thleng vek tawhin, vawiin February ni 23, 2026 hian Cheque emaw Direct Beneficiary Transfer hmangin emaw zangnadawmna dawngtute hnenah pek chhuah tan a ni.

African Swine Fever (ASF) avanga ran suatte Compensation Rate chu hetiang hian siam a ni:

Kg 15 hnuai lam      : Rs 2,200

Kg 15-40 inkar        : Rs 5,800

Kg 40-70 inkar        : Rs 8,400

Kg 70-100 inkar      : Rs 12,000

Kg 100 chunglam   : Rs 15,000
